results.rendered_html:
pra-√dṛś Pass. -dṛśyate (cf. pra√paś), to become visible, be seen, appear,  RV.  &c. &c.:
Caus. -darśayati, to make visible, show, indicate, explain, teach, describe,  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Desid. -didṛkṣate, to wish to see,  Bhaṭṭ.

results.rendered_html:
pradṛś 1 P.
1 To see, behold.
2 To look at, regard.
3 To foresee.
4 To observe, perceive, discern.
5 To be intelligent.
6 To think, have an opinion.
7 To look at, look upon.
— Pass.
1 To become visible.
2 To look, appear.
— Caus.
1 To show, point out, discover, exhibit.
2 To make clear, prove, demonstrate, explain.
